item.title:

The panel for today’s Leinster Senior Football Championship Quarter-Final against West
item.description:
Meath GAA @MeathGAA · 3min ICYMI
The panel for today’s Leinster Senior Football Championship Quarter-Final against Westmeath.
Throw in is at 14:00 in Glenisk O’Connor Park, Tullamore.
Match ’s are available from selected SuperValu/Centra stores or via the link: https:// leinstergaa.ie/leinster-gaa-t ickets/ …
